title: cenchrus geniculatus
intro: Cenchrus geniculatus, also known as the 'Bristle Grass' or 'Nettle Grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus geniculatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, poultices, and ointments to treat various health conditions.
